title: [ARCH] OpenAI Responses API provider path
description: gpt-5.x-codex models were trained on Responses API format (local_shell native tool, freeform apply_patch). Ion uses Chat Completions with standard function tools — format mismatch is the biggest performance gap vs Codex CLI. Requires new provider implementation path alongside existing openai_compat. See ai/research/codex-cli-system-prompt-tools-2026.md for full analysis.

logs.msg: Implemented and reviewed. Two commits: initial provider (types, convert, client, mod) + review fixes (double-emission guard, strict:false, complete() tool calls, budget→effort mapping, temperature, name-from-done). 486 tests pass, clippy clean.
